queries.name: All 202630 SFBETRM students
queries.description: Pull all 202630 SFBETRM students that have Enrollment Status of EL

columns.name: SFBETRM_PIDM
columns.description: Internal ID.

columns.name: SFBETRM_TERM_CODE
columns.description: Term code associated with this registration.

columns.name: SFBETRM_ESTS_CODE
columns.description: Enrollment Status. Common values are EL, OW, OA, etc

columns.name: SFBETRM_ESTS_DATE
columns.description: Identifies the date associated with the student enrollment status code.

columns.name: SFBETRM_MHRS_OVER
columns.description: 'maximum hours' override for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_AR_IND
columns.description: identifies the term charges acceptance indicator.

columns.name: SFBETRM_ASSESSMENT_DATE
columns.description: Identifies the date of the assessment for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_ADD_DATE
columns.description: identifies the date of the initial registration for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Specifies the most current date the record was created or updated.

columns.name: SFBETRM_RGRE_CODE
columns.description: Student Registration Reason Code. Note: STVRGRE is empty.

columns.name: SFBETRM_TMST_CODE
columns.description: Most recently calculated time status code. FT - Full Time, HT - Half Time, etc

columns.name: SFBETRM_TMST_DATE
columns.description: Date change in time status occurred.

columns.name: SFBETRM_TMST_MAINT_IND
columns.description: Flag indicating whether the change in time status was calculated by the system or overridden and updated by a user.

columns.name: SFBETRM_USER
columns.description: The ID of the user who updated or created the record.

columns.name: SFBETRM_REFUND_DATE
columns.description: Refund by total refund date used in performing fee assessment. Date is needed for refund by total processing to determine the refund period used in the last assessment.

columns.name: SFBETRM_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SFBETRM_INITIAL_REG_DATE
columns.description: Indicates the date when a student's initial or original registration occurred. This date is consulted in registration fee assessment when initial registration grace is in effect for a term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_MIN_HRS
columns.description: Identifies the minimum hours override for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_MINH_SRCE_CDE
columns.description: Identifies the source of the minimum hours override for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_MAXH_SRCE_CDE
columns.description: Identifies the source of the maximum hours override for this term.

columns.name: SFBETRM_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SFBETRM_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SFBETRM_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SFBETRM_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SFBETRM_GUID
columns.description: Student Registration Table Global Unique Identifier: Stores the global unique identifier for a student registration object.

columns.name: SFBETRM_STU_ACAD_PERD_GUID
columns.description: STUDENT ACADEMIC PERIOD GUID: Global Unique Identifier to uniquely identify the record of a resource for integration.
